title: Seed Cells Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will pick up tips.

steps.title: In this protocol, 250µL of cells...
steps.instruction: In this protocol, 250µL of cells are transferred from the [NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/verified-labware/products/nest-12-well-reservoir-15-ml) to the SPL 96-Well Cell Culture Plates. Explanation of complex parameters below: * **P300-Multi Mount**: Select which mount the P300-Multi Pipette is attached to. * **Number of Destination Plates**: Select the number of destination plates. ---

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix Cells in **Column 3** of NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 250µL of Cells from NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL to Columns 1-6 of the first Destination Plate (Slot 1).

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will mix Cells in **Column 4** of NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL.

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will transfer 250µL of Cells from NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL to Columns 7-12 of the first Destination Plate (Slot 1).

steps.title: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop...
steps.instruction: P300 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2) will drop used tips in the waste bin.

steps.title: Steps 1-8 will repeat for each...
steps.instruction: Steps 1-8 will repeat for each additional destination plate, accessing the following two channels of the reservoir for each plate.
